---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose something new
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem
What problem does this solve? Who is affected and how often?

## Proposed Solution
What should be built? Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered
What else could solve this problem? Why is this the best approach?

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Given [context], when [action], then [result]
- [ ] ...

## Out of Scope
What explicitly is NOT part of this request?

## Additional Context
Mockups, references, related issues.
